englishDefinitions: A novel by Jeffrey Eugenides and a film adaptation based on it.
A well-known cultural work about a tragic family and a group of teenage girls.
persianTranslation: نام یک رمان و فیلم: «خودکشی‌های باکره»
examples: The Virgin Suicides is often studied in modern literature classes.
She watched the film adaptation of The Virgin Suicides last night.
The Virgin Suicides has a haunting and dreamlike style.
